title: Skill Frontmatter Schema
description: Validates the frontmatter block at the top of an agentic SKILL.md file.

slug.description: Unique identifier for the skill, often matching the filename.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the skill.

owner.description: The owner or maintainer of the skill.

created.description: Creation date of the skill in YYYY-MM-DD format.

updated.description: Last updated date of the skill in YYYY-MM-DD format.

summary.description: A brief description of what the skill does.

prefers_codemode.description: If true, opt-in to Code Mode delegation during skill boot.
